title: TechScreen rubric YAML contract (T08, FR-002)
description: Schema for files in configs/rubric/<stack-id>.yaml. One YAML file per stack. Every node has a stable id; renames are forbidden (retire + introduce). Sunset / retired nodes remain forever (§4 / ADR-018).

version.description: Bumped whenever this file's content changes. Documentation-only; the runtime importer compares SHA-256 payload hashes, not this integer.

retired.description: Retire the entire stack. When true, every node inside is treated as retired.

id.description: Stable identifier. snake_case segments separated by dots. Never renamed. Never reused after retire.

label_en.description: Internal English label. Required on every node (§11).

label_uk.description: Candidate-facing Ukrainian label. Required when retired=false (validated via if/then).

parent.description: Stable id of the parent node, or null for top-level (== competency_block).

levels.description: Present only on competency-leaf nodes. Each level has a rank (1..5), labels, and an EN descriptor.

descriptor_en.description: Internal English descriptor consumed by the Assessor (§11 / ADR-008).
